questionHtml: Explain why, as the reaction proceeds, the pressure increases by the amount shown.
markschemeHtml:
increase in the amount/number of moles/molecules «of gas»  [✔]

from 2 to 3/by 50 %  [✔]

meta.title: Explain why, as the reaction proceeds, the pressure increases by the amount shown.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 1. Models of the particulate nature of matter

Structure 1.5.1—An ideal gas consists of moving particles with negligible volume and no intermolecular forces. All collisions between particles are considered elastic. Recognize the key assumptions in the ideal gas model.
